title: Smoking substitute apparatus and smoking substitute kit
abstract: A smoking substitute apparatus (502) has a flavourant-receiving portion (454) configured to receive a flavourant from a flavourant applicator (456/504). A smoking substitute kit (450/500) includes a smoking substitute apparatus (502) and a flavourant applicator (456/504) for applying a flavourant-containing element to the flavourant-receiving portion (454) of the smoking substitute apparatus (502).
claims: Claims 1. A smoking substitute apparatus having: a flavourant-receiving portion configured to receive a flavourant from a flavourant applicator. 2. The smoking substitute apparatus according to claim 1 , wherein the flavourant-receiving portion is on an outside surface of the smoking substitute apparatus. 3. A smoking substitute apparatus according to claim 1 or claim 2, wherein: the flavourant-receiving portion is located at or near a mouthpiece of the smoking substitute apparatus. 4. A smoking substitute apparatus according to any one of the previous claims, wherein: the flavourant-receiving portion is configured to receive a liquid flavourant. 5. A smoking substitute apparatus according to claim 4, wherein: the flavourant-receiving portion includes a porous material configured to absorb liquid flavourant. 6. A smoking substitute apparatus according to claim 5, wherein: the porous material includes one or more of: a porous polymer, activated carbon, and wood. 7. A smoking substitute apparatus according to any one of claims 1 to 6, wherein: the flavourant-receiving portion includes a plurality of microchannels. 8. A smoking substitute apparatus according to any one of claims 1 to 7, wherein: the flavourant-receiving portion includes a textured surface. 9. A smoking substitute apparatus according to any one of claims 1 to 8, wherein: the flavourant-receiving portion includes a recess configured to receive a droplet of liquid flavourant. 10. A smoking substitute apparatus according to claim 9, wherein: the flavourant-receiving portion is configured to retain the droplet therein against gravity. 11. A smoking substitute apparatus according to claim 10, wherein: the recess is shaped such that the droplet is retained therein by surface tension of the liquid flavourant. 12. A smoking substitute apparatus according to claim 11 , wherein: the recess has a volume of 0.2 to 0.5 ml. 13. A smoking substitute kit including: a smoking substitute apparatus according to any one of claims 1 to 12; and a flavourant applicator for applying a flavourant-containing element to the flavourant receiving portion of the smoking substitute apparatus. 14. A smoking substitute kit according to claim 13, wherein: the flavourant applicator is configured to apply a liquid flavourant to the flavourant receiving portion of the smoking substitute apparatus, to form the flavourant-containing element. 15. A smoking substitute kit according to claim 13 or claim 14, wherein: the flavourant applicator is in the form of a pen. 16. A smoking substitute kit according to claim 13 or claim 14, wherein: the flavourant applicator is in the form of a dropper or a pipette. 17. A smoking substitute kit according to claim 16, wherein: the dropper or pipette is configured to supply a droplet having a volume of 0.2 to 0.5 ml. 18. A smoking substitute kit according to claim 13 or claim 14, wherein: the flavourant applicator includes flavourant encapsulated in plurality of microcapsules. 19. A smoking substitute kit according to claim 18, wherein: the microcapsules are configured to rupture, disintegrate, or break down when the flavour applicator is rubbed or pressed against the flavourant-receiving portion of the smoking substitute apparatus, thereby releasing the flavourant onto the flavourant- receiving portion of the smoking substitute apparatus. 20. A smoking substitute kit according to claim 13 or claim 14, wherein: the flavourant applicator includes a flavourant layer and a protective layer covering the flavourant layer. 21. A smoking substitute kit according to claim 20, wherein: the protective layer is configured to rupture, break down, or disintegrate when the flavourant applicator is pressed or rubbed against the flavourant-receiving portion of the smoking substitute apparatus, thereby releasing the flavourant onto the flavourant- receiving portion of the smoking substitute apparatus.
